title: NoNightmares
description:
Adds the Wakefulness effect that prevents phantoms from spawning.
Can be brewed and selected as a Beacon effect.
body:
## The mod adds a new effect, “Wakefulness”, which protects you from phantoms.
![Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb70e8ef08630941549cf5004e94a9b9d4b16a2c.png)

## 🧪 Recipe: **Water Bottle** + **Cocoa Beans**
![Potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af1d999e8573015c720f94173c19cee26283ae01.webp)

The potion can also be made stronger: **Potion of Wakefulness** + **Phantom Membrane**


## ⛏ You can also apply this effect to a beacon.
![Beacon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc350866f92a9da03b994376140bf353b1b4b800.png)

**Now nothing will disturb you while working on your builds! 👍**


Thanks to **Froska729** for the effect icon ❤️
